docs.title: Bugfish Documentations
docs.text: Browse all project documentation online—accessible anytime, anywhere.

docs.title: SuitefishCMS
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A multi-site PHP CMS for quick website deployment. It simplifies setup, customization, and maintenance, ideal for managing multiple sites on a single platform.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Bugfish Framework
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A robust framework integrating PHP, CSS, and JavaScript to streamline web application development.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Bind9 Web Manager
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A PHP-based DNS management tool with user administration and replication features, compatible with Plesk, ISPConfig, and Virtualmin.

A privileged server user is required to run this software.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Linux-Server-Manager
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A PHP-based server management tool for Debian and Ubuntu systems, offering administration, system monitoring, and deployment features.

A privileged server user is required to run this software.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Docker Server Manager
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A PHP-based Docker management tool with user administration and deployment features, compatible with running installation.

A privileged server user is required to run this software.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Online Book Renting
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A web-based platform for managing book rentals, featuring user management, multi-language support, and ISBN handling.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Dolibarr Framework
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A Dolibarr module that integrates the Bugfish Framework, adding development tools and logging features.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Mail Relaying over DNS
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Transforms your server into a mail backup relay, storing and forwarding mail when the primary server is offline.

A privileged server user is required to run this software.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Android Web App Example
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 An Android Studio project to create a simple web app with navigation controls, easily customizable for your website.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Dovecot Certificate Interface
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Automates Dovecot per-domain SSL certificate setup, managing ISPConfig configurations or working independently.

A privileged server user is required to run this software.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Image Download Manager
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Downloads images from a website, with options to explore subpages and filter high-definition images.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: jQuery Sortselect
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A jQuery plugin that enhances <select> elements with dual sortable select boxes for better UI control.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Proxmox VMA2RAW
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 Converts Proxmox VMA backup files to raw disk images using a Docker image.

Download Documentation GitHub

docs.title: Repository Template
docs.text:
License: GPLv3 A GitHub repository template with docker setup, documentation, and examples for quick project start.

Download Documentation GitHub
